title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Liases Foras - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Liases Foras - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
